console.heading: Console Output
console.description: Log messages printed to the developer console

file.heading: File Output
file.description: Log messages written to a file on disk

overlay.heading: Overlay Window
overlay.opacityHint: Controls how transparent the overlay background appears

logPath.heading: Game Log Path
logPath.label: Torchlight Infinite Folder
logPath.hint: Select the root installation folder. The tracker will look for TorchLight\Saved\Logs\UE_game.log inside it.

itemImport.heading: Item Data
itemImport.label: Import item prices from a full_table.json file. Existing items are kept as-is.
itemImport.noneNew: No new items — all were already present.

serperApiKey.label: Serper API Key
serperApiKey.hint: Used for item name lookup via serper.dev (max 10/day, 2500 free/month). Get a free key at serper.dev.
